system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3_reload","body":"
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_NGUKIM_HISTORY3_RELOAD] (
   @masp        NVARCHAR (200),
   @ngaythang   DATE)
AS
DECLARE @mact   NVARCHAR (200)
DECLARE @soluong   FLOAT
DECLARE @HWforWW   BIT
DECLARE @HWforPacking   BIT
DECLARE @HWforAI   BIT
DECLARE @ghichu   NVARCHAR (200)
DECLARE @nguoisua   NVARCHAR (50)
DECLARE @ngaysua   DATETIME
DECLARE @id_dinhmuc   NVARCHAR (50)

DECLARE @tenct   NVARCHAR (MAX)
DECLARE @quycach   NVARCHAR (200)
DECLARE @mausac   NVARCHAR (200)

DECLARE
   CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
      SELECT mavt,
             soluong,
             HWforWW,
             HWforPacking,
             HWforAI,
             ghichu,
             nguoisua,
             ngaysua,
             id_dinhmuc
      FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim WITH (NOLOCK)
      WHERE masp = @masp

OPEN CUR
FETCH NEXT FROM CUR
     INTO @mact,
          @soluong,
          @HWforWW,
          @HWforPacking,
          @HWforAI,
          @ghichu,
          @nguoisua,
          @ngaysua,
          @id_dinhmuc

WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
   SET @tenct = ''
   SET @quycach = ''
   SET @mausac = ''

   SELECT @tenct = mota, @quycach = quycach, @mausac = mausac
   FROM tr_material WITH (NOLOCK)
   WHERE mavt = @mact

   IF EXISTS
         (SELECT id
          FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3
          WHERE     id_dinhmuc = @id_dinhmuc
                AND masp = @masp
                AND ngaythang = @ngaythang)
      BEGIN
         UPDATE tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3
         SET mact_new = @mact,
             tenct_new = @tenct,
             quycach_new = @quycach,
             mausac_new = @mausac,
             soluong_new = @soluong,
             truocson_new = @HWforWW,
             sauson_new = @HWforPacking,
             ai_new = @HWforAI,
             ghichu_new = @ghichu,
             actions_type = 'U',
             ngaysua = @ngaysua,
             nguoisua = @nguoisua
         WHERE     masp = @masp
               AND ngaythang = @ngaythang
               AND id_dinhmuc = @id_dinhmuc
      END
   ELSE
      BEGIN
         INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3 (id,
                                                 ngaythang,
                                                 masp,
                                                 mact_new,
                                                 soluong_new,
                                                 truocson_new,
                                                 sauson_new,
                                                 ai_new,
                                                 ghichu_new,
                                                 actions_type,
                                                 ngaysua,
                                                 nguoisua,
												 tenct_new, quycach_new, mausac_new,
                                                 id_dinhmuc)
         VALUES (newid (),
                 @ngaythang,
                 @masp,
                 @mact,
                 @soluong,
                 @HWforWW,
                 @HWforPacking,
                 @HWforAI,
                 @ghichu,
                 'I',
                 @ngaysua,
                 @nguoisua,
				 @tenct, @quycach, @mausac,
                 @id_dinhmuc)
      END

   FETCH NEXT FROM CUR
        INTO @mact,
             @soluong,
             @HWforWW,
             @HWforPacking,
             @HWforAI,
             @ghichu,
             @nguoisua,
             @ngaysua,
             @id_dinhmuc
END

CLOSE CUR
DEALLOCATE CUR

UPDATE tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3
SET actions_type = 'D'
WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang AND actions_type IS NULL
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3","dbo.tr_material"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3"],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
